title: Neon's Client
description: This modpack has a list of client sided Vanilla+ mods. I use these mods daily whenever playing vanilla Minecraft.
body:
I hope this modpack will become your go-to replacement for vanilla Minecraft. This is a client-side modpack, so you can still play on servers like Hypixel as usual, with a few small tweaks, of course. And yes, You may use this as a base for your own modpack.

The modpack adds
- Frame rate improvement mods such as sodium and lithium
- Small visual improvements such as dynamic lighting
- Keybind fixes so you can use modifier keys
- Gui mods like CustomHud and Chat heads
- And more!
